infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nutriva needs camera access to scan QR codes and take product photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nutriva needs photo library access to upload product images and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Nutriva needs permission to save images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nutriva uses your location to find nearby stores and set delivery addresses.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Nutriva uses your location to track deliveries in the background.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nutriva needs microphone access for voice search and support calls.

plugins.microphonePermission: Nutriva needs microphone access for voice search and support calls.

plugins.photosPermission: Nutriva needs access to your photos to upload product images.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Nutriva needs permission to save images to your gallery.
